case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. BERNARDO YOVANY LOPEZ MEJIA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-18-2019 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,950.15 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MEJIA, BERNARDO YOVANY LOPEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00) SERVED SEP-30-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MEJIA, BERNARDO YOVANY LOPEZ

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-18-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-18-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT NARALLANA SANCHEZ LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT BERNARDO YOVANY LOPEZ MEJIA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEJIA, BERNARDO YOVANY LOPEZ $1,950.15 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,050.15 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
